rulings.Case Title: MIGUEL SOSA et al VS. BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT BTP MISSION TIFFANY LLC MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. GRANTED with 10-day leave to amend for Plaintiffs to allege which officer, director, or managing agent of Defendant was involved in specific wrongful acts/omissions and/or ratified specific wrongful acts/omissions giving rise to request for punitive damages. Conclusory allegations in 11 are insufficient. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DON LEVISON VS. KEVIN BARNARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT KEVIN BARNARD NOTICE Of MOTION And MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons. is DENIED, 5 days to respond. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts to support unlawful detainer and service of 5-day summons. Extension to the lease is attached to the compliant. Defendant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that notices of rent increase are "addenda or attachments that form the basis or the complaint" within the meaning of CCP 1166(d)(1)(B) in a habitual late payment case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PATRICIA JURADO VS. NEIL BERNT MARTINSON
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT NEIL MARTINSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Defendant raises issues of fact not apparent on the face of complaint (i.e. 2.2% allowable rent increase). Notice sufficiently describes grounds under which possession is sought and is not unintelligible. = (501/REQ)
